title: Kursk: Russian court sentences Ukrainian soldier to 15 years in prison over...
title_en: Kursk: Russian court sentences Ukrainian soldier to 15 years in prison over...

description: Russian court sentences Ukrainian soldier to 15 years in prison over Kursk incursion. The case is part of a broader wave of prosecutions targeting Ukrainian prisoners of war (POWs) captured during Ukraine's cross-border operation into Kursk Oblast launched in August 2024.
description_en: Russian court sentences Ukrainian soldier to 15 years in prison over Kursk incursion. The case is part of a broader wave of prosecutions targeting Ukrainian prisoners of war (POWs) captured during Ukraine's cross-border operation into Kursk Oblast launched in August 2024.
description_uk: Russian court sentences Ukrainian soldier to 15 years in prison over Kursk incursion. The case is part of a broader wave of prosecutions targeting Ukrainian prisoners of war (POWs) captured during Ukraine's cross-border operation into Kursk Oblast launched in August 2024.

title: "Dear servicemen and veterans of the Military Law and Order Service!...
title_en: "Dear servicemen and veterans of the Military Law and Order Service!...
title_uk: «Шановні військовослужбовці та ветерани Військової служби правопорядку!...
description: "Dear servicemen and veterans of the Military Law and Order Service! I sincerely congratulate you on your professional holiday! Today, the Military Law and Order Service is much more than a control or response body. Military law enforcement officers ensure compliance with the law, fight crime, and also perform a wide range of other tasks. The development of combat potential deserves special attention...
description_en: "Dear servicemen and veterans of the Military Law and Order Service! I sincerely congratulate you on your professional holiday! Today, the Military Law and Order Service is much more than a control or response body. Military law enforcement officers ensure compliance with the law, fight crime, and also perform a wide range of other tasks. The development of combat potential deserves special attention...
description_uk: "Шановні військовослужбовці та ветерани Військової служби правопорядку! Щиро вітаю вас із професійним святом! Сьогодні Військова служба правопорядку — це значно більше, ніж орган контролю чи реагування. Військові правоохоронці забезпечують дотримання законності, протидіють правопорушенням, а також виконують широкий спектр інших завдань. Особливої уваги заслуговує розвиток бойового потенціалу...

title: Kyiv: 32 drones intercepted
description: At least 3 killed, 26 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Ukraine's Air Force said it shot down 203 of 236 Russian drones overnight. Direct hits by 32 drones were recorded at 18 locations, while falling debris was reported at eight additional sites.
description_en: At least 3 killed, 26 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Ukraine's Air Force said it shot down 203 of 236 Russian drones overnight. Direct hits by 32 drones were recorded at 18 locations, while falling debris was reported at eight additional sites.
description_uk: At least 3 killed, 26 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Ukraine's Air Force said it shot down 203 of 236 Russian drones overnight. Direct hits by 32 drones were recorded at 18 locations, while falling debris was reported at eight additional sites.

title: Air defense active
description: For the first time in the world: the Ukrainian military shot down "Shakhed" with an interceptor drone from a surface platform. The interceptor was launched from a sea platform, which became a new level of integration of sea and air drones and expands the possibilities of defense against air attacks.
description_en: For the first time in the world: the Ukrainian military shot down "Shakhed" with an interceptor drone from a surface platform. The interceptor was launched from a sea platform, which became a new level of integration of sea and air drones and expands the possibilities of defense against air attacks.
description_uk: Впервые в мире: украинские военные сбили "Шахед" дроном-перехватчиком с надводной платформы Перехватчик был запущен с морской платформы, что стало новым уровнем интеграции морских и воздушных дронов и расширяет возможности защиты от воздушных атак.

title: Drone strike
description: The defense forces defeated the company for the production of "Molnia" drones in Russia, - the General Staff. This is the "Atlant Aero" plant in Taganrog, where they develop and produce attack-reconnaissance UAVs and components, including for "Orion" drones. As a result of the attack, a fire broke out at the facility. The strike, as noted, may reduce Russia's ability to produce drones and strike Ukraine.
description_en: The defense forces defeated the company for the production of "Molnia" drones in Russia, - the General Staff. This is the "Atlant Aero" plant in Taganrog, where they develop and produce attack-reconnaissance UAVs and components, including for "Orion" drones. As a result of the attack, a fire broke out at the facility. The strike, as noted, may reduce Russia's ability to produce drones and strike Ukraine.
description_uk: Силы обороны поразили предприятие по производству дронов "Молния" в россии, - Генштаб Речь идёт о заводе "Атлант Аэро" в Таганроге, где разрабатывают и производят ударно-разведывательные БПЛА и комплектующие, в том числе для дронов "Орион". В результате атаки на объекте возник пожар. Удар, как отмечается, может снизить возможности рф по производству беспилотников и нанесению ударов по Украине.

title: Strike confirmed on residential building
description: As a result of a drone attack on Chernihiv, a 16-year-old boy was killed. Impacts were recorded in different areas of the city: a lyceum, private houses, an industrial facility and a non-working medical facility were damaged.
description_en: As a result of a drone attack on Chernihiv, a 16-year-old boy was killed. Impacts were recorded in different areas of the city: a lyceum, private houses, an industrial facility and a non-working medical facility were damaged.
description_uk: В результате атаки дронов на Чернигов погиб 16-летний парень Ещё четыре человека пострадали. Удары зафиксированы в разных районах города: повреждены лицей, частные дома, промышленный объект и неработающее медучреждение.

title: Crimea: Casualties reported
description: Investigators of the National Police and SBU are currently investigating all the circumstances of the attack on ordinary people in Kyiv. The attacker was eliminated. He held hostages and unfortunately killed one of the hostages. He killed four people just on the street. Another woman died in the hospital: a serious injury. My condolences to the relatives and friends of the deceased. Four hostages were rescued. As of this time, it is known that...

He held hostages and unfortunately killed one of the hostages. He killed four people just on the street. Another woman died in the hospital: a serious injury. My condolences to the relatives and friends of the deceased. Four hostages were rescued. As of this time, it is known that...
description_uk: Слідчі Національної поліції та СБУ ведуть зараз розслідування всіх обставин нападу в Києві на звичайних людей. Нападник був ліквідований. Він тримав заручників і одного із заручників, на жаль, убив. Чотирьох людей він убив просто на вулиці. Ще одна жінка померла в лікарні: важке поранення. Мої співчуття рідним та близьким загиблих. Чотирьох заручників вдалося врятувати. Станом на цей час відомо,...

title: Law enforcement officers take away the body of one of the victims of...
title_en: Law enforcement officers take away the body of one of the victims of...
title_uk: Правоохоронці забрали тіло однієї з жертв...
description: Law enforcement officers take away the body of one of the victims of the terrorist. Journalists spoke with the son of the murdered woman. According to him, the deceased was 58 years old, her name was Tatiana. She was walking from home to Holoseevsky Park. The son said that he still talked to her during the day. According to him, she was a good person and many years ago she moved to Kyiv from Donetsk.
description_en: Law enforcement officers take away the body of one of the victims of the terrorist. Journalists spoke with the son of the murdered woman. According to him, the deceased was 58 years old, her name was Tatiana. She was walking from home to Holoseevsky Park. The son said that he still talked to her during the day. According to him, she was a good person and many years ago she moved to Kyiv from Donetsk.
description_uk: Правоохранители забирают тело одной из жертв террориста Журналисты пообщались с сыном убитой. По его словам, погибшей было 58 лет, её звали Татьяна. Она шла из дома в парк «Голосеевский». Сын рассказал, что днём ещё разговаривал с ней. По его словам, она была добрым человеком и много лет назад переехала в Киев из Донецка.

title: Kyiv: 9 injured
description: Update: Death toll rises to 6 in Kyiv shooting; 9 injured. One of the previously hospitalized victims has died of their injuries, bringing the total number of fatalities to six. Nine people remain injured.

title: Kyiv: 5 killed, 10 injured
description: Update: Gunman killed after opening fire in Kyiv supermarket; 5 dead, 10 injured. The gunman has been identified as a 58-year-old native of Moscow. Authorities now report at least five people dead and 10 injured.
description_en: Update: Gunman killed after opening fire in Kyiv supermarket; 5 dead, 10 injured. The gunman has been identified as a 58-year-old native of Moscow. Authorities now report at least five people dead and 10 injured.

title: Kyiv: 2 killed, 10 injured
description: Update: Gunman killed after opening fire in Kyiv supermarket; 2 dead, 10 injured. The shooter was killed as special police forces moved in to detain him. Authorities now report at least two people dead and 10 injured.
description_en: Update: Gunman killed after opening fire in Kyiv supermarket; 2 dead, 10 injured. The shooter was killed as special police forces moved in to detain him. Authorities now report at least two people dead and 10 injured.

title: Casualties reported
description: 🇨🇭 Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Switzerland Ignazio Cassis 💬 "Had a fruitful meeting with my Swiss counterpart Ignazio Cassis, who is also currently the acting head of the OSCE. I briefed him on the current state of peace efforts, the situation on the battlefield and the recent brutal Russian missile and drone attacks on Ukraine, which killed and injured civilians....
description_en: 🇨🇭 Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Switzerland Ignazio Cassis 💬 "Had a fruitful meeting with my Swiss counterpart Ignazio Cassis, who is also currently the acting head of the OSCE. I briefed him on the current state of peace efforts, the situation on the battlefield and the recent brutal Russian missile and drone attacks on Ukraine, which killed and injured civilians....
description_uk: 🇨🇭 Андрій Сибіга провів зустріч з міністром закордонних справ Швейцарії Ігнаціо Кассісом 💬 "Мав плідну зустріч зі своїм швейцарським колегою Ігнаціо Кассісом, який наразі також є діючим головою ОБСЄ. Я поінформував його про поточний стан мирних зусиль, ситуацію на полі бою та нещодавні жорстокі ракетно-дронові атаки Росії по Україні, в результаті яких загинули та отримали поранення цивільні люди....

title: Airstrike attack
description: The Minister of Internal Affairs of Ukraine, Ihor Klymenko, has just reported on the elimination of an attacker in Kyiv who opened fire on ordinary people. All circumstances are being clarified. So far, 5 people have died. My condolences to family and friends. As of now, 10 people are hospitalized with wounds and injuries. All are provided with the necessary assistance. Four hostages were rescued. We count on operational...
description_en: The Minister of Internal Affairs of Ukraine, Ihor Klymenko, has just reported on the elimination of an attacker in Kyiv who opened fire on ordinary people. All circumstances are being clarified. So far, 5 people have died. My condolences to family and friends. As of now, 10 people are hospitalized with wounds and injuries. All are provided with the necessary assistance. Four hostages were rescued. We count on operational...
description_uk: Щойно міністр внутрішніх справ України Ігор Клименко доповів про ліквідацію в Києві нападника, який відкрив вогонь по звичайних людях. Усі обставини зʼясовуються. Наразі відомо про 5 загиблих. Мої співчуття рідним та близьким. Станом на зараз 10 людей госпіталізовані з пораненнями й травмами. Усім надається необхідна допомога. Чотирьох заручників вдалося врятувати. Розраховуємо на оперативне...
